title: Kids Interactive App — Initial Build

requirements.text: Create a welcoming home screen with a large animated title, colorful character mascot or illustration, and clearly labeled activity buttons that a child can independently navigate.

quotes: I want to create a app for kids

acceptanceCriteria: Home screen displays a large, readable title with playful typography
At least three activity section buttons are visible and labeled with both icons and text
Buttons respond with a fun hover/tap animation
Layout is fully responsive and works on tablet-sized screens

requirements.text: Implement a simple Number & Letter Learning section where kids can tap/click on letters A–Z and numbers 1–20 to hear or see their name displayed in a large, animated pop-up card.

quotes: I want to create a app for kids

acceptanceCriteria: A grid of letter and number cards is displayed
Tapping a card shows a full-screen animated card with the letter/number rendered in large, colorful text
A 'Back' button returns the child to the grid

requirements.text: Implement a simple Memory Match mini-game with colorful emoji or animal cards. Cards are placed face-down and a child flips two at a time to find matching pairs. Track and display the number of matches found.

quotes: I want to create a app for kids

acceptanceCriteria: A 4×4 grid of face-down cards is displayed
Clicking a card flips it with an animation to reveal its image
Two revealed non-matching cards flip back after a short delay
Matching pairs remain face-up and are highlighted
A match counter updates after each successful pair
A congratulatory message appears when all pairs are matched

requirements.text: Implement a simple Color & Draw canvas where kids can pick a color from a palette and draw freely with their mouse or finger (touch support), plus a 'Clear' button to reset the canvas.

quotes: I want to create a app for kids

acceptanceCriteria: A full-width drawing canvas is rendered
A color palette with at least 8 bright colors is displayed
Mouse drag and touch drag both draw on the canvas
A 'Clear' button wipes the canvas
Brush strokes are smooth and rounded

requirements.text: Store and retrieve each child's best Memory Match score (fewest moves) using the backend so progress persists across sessions.

quotes: I want to create a app for kids

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a function to save a match score (move count)
Backend exposes a function to retrieve the all-time best score
Score is displayed on the Memory Match screen as 'Best: X moves'

requirements.text: Apply a consistent, joyful visual theme across the entire app: bright primary colors (reds, yellows, greens, oranges), rounded bubbly shapes, large chunky typography (e.g., a rounded sans-serif), star/confetti decorative accents, and high-contrast elements to ensure readability for young children. Navigation must be icon-first with large tap targets (minimum 48×48px).

quotes: I want to create a app for kids

acceptanceCriteria: All screens use the same color palette and typeface
All interactive elements have a minimum tap target of 48×48px
No small or hard-to-read text appears anywhere in the UI
Decorative accents (stars, confetti shapes) appear consistently in section headers

constraints: All content must be age-appropriate for young children (ages 3–8)
No external APIs, ads, or third-party tracking
No authentication required — the app must be immediately usable without a login
nonGoals: Audio playback or text-to-speech (no audio assets available)

required: Cheerful cartoon sun mascot character with a smiling face and rosy cheeks, transparent background (mascot-sun.dim_256x256.png)
Colorful confetti banner decoration strip with stars, dots, and zigzags on a transparent background (confetti-banner.dim_800x120.png)
Set of 8 cute animal emoji-style card face illustrations (cat, dog, frog, rabbit, bear, duck, owl, fox) arranged in a 2×4 grid, each on a rounded pastel tile (animal-cards.dim_512x256.png)
